structure_sections.target_fill: spend a busy day with me school climbing a startup advisory North Bend

structure_sections.script_template: I woke up <time>, took a quick <action>.
structure_sections.target_fill: research and a networking event I woke up at 7 took a quick shower

shower and headed straight to school for APES and Gov I then left early and drove out to North Bend to return my ski While driving I did modeling work for my internship I'm currently at ISB a comp biolab and I'm working on preeclampsia diagnostic modeling Then after some side questing in North Bend I came back to a two hour advisory meeting with Carthick from Lush Life talking through Presonance a comp neuro ad tool I'm building to simulate ad responses After that I went straight to climbing Then a WTAI networking event where I met a bunch of cool people and talked to people from Google who were actually interested in what we're building

It was already about 9 so I headed home and then finished research for a neuromorphic memory paper I'm co authoring It got to about 12 so I edited this video and then finally went to bed at like 1 Follow for more busy days

structure_rationale: Each inspiration reel clearly follows the pattern of an engaging hook, followed by a descriptive series of actions and concludes with a call to action.
content_source_patterns: screen recording of the subject's website
close-up of a relevant prop or artifact
screenshot of the subject's social media profile

- reel 2: 48.1s, 41 shots, cuts/sec=0.83, text=98%, SFX=100/min
- reel 3: 98.9s, 75 shots, cuts/sec=0.75, text=96%, SFX=116/min
